_comment: Routing table for the /check-client-surface orchestrator. A category listed here has a DETERMINISTIC check (the orchestrator runs verify.py with these params instead of judging). A category NOT listed is verified by AI. 'check' picks the verify.py routine.
_promotable: Categories with a verify.py routine but intentionally left OUT of this table are AI-verified until a language adds them here. Example: 'hierarchy' -> {"check": "class_base_subtype"} promotes the Dog-extends-Pet check from AI to deterministic without changing the spec assertion.
